# Aditya Agarwal

> Software Engineer, Founder & Creator. Building at the intersection of entertainment and AI at Coreflow AI, Sydney. BITS Pilani graduate. Maker of products with 200K+ downloads. Travel, Tech & Finance enthusiast. Pianist.

## About

Aditya Agarwal is a full-stack software engineer, founder, and creator based in Sydney, Australia. He has built consumer products from zero to scale — including apps with 250K+ organic downloads and platforms serving 20K+ users. Currently a founding engineer at Coreflow AI, building at the intersection of entertainment and AI. Outside of code, he's a pianist, traveler, and writes about AI's impact on developer workflows. His mantra: Travel | Tech | Finance.

## Current

- Software Engineer (Founding) at Coreflow AI, Sydney, Australia (Oct 2025 - Present)
- Writing on DEV Community about AI tooling, developer workflows, and open source

## Experience

- Software Engineer at Wishlink, Gurugram (Mar 2023 - Sep 2025) — Built ecommerce platform for creators and the main Wishlink user app from scratch as a full-stack engineer
- Associate Software Engineer at DigiCert, Bengaluru (Aug 2022 - Dec 2022) — Cert Central project, Spring Boot / Java, third-party integration security layer for API calls
- CTO at Hcare: Online Homeopathy Consultancy, Bangalore (Apr 2021 - Aug 2022) — Technical and design head. Built complete Android app with UI/UX, scaled to 20K+ users across platforms, developed wallet & referral system with Firebase
- Founder at x3ntech, Mumbai (Apr 2020 - Mar 2022) — Development company with multiple live apps. 200K+ downloads on Google Play Store, 4.6 star average rating. Quality & design-focused development

## Notable Products & Projects

- Neo Vault — Built from scratch, scaled 0 to ~250K downloads with primarily organic growth using ASO
- Nox — Smart browser extension for dark/light mode theme control on any website. Published on Chrome Web Store, Firefox Add-ons, and Mac App Store (Safari)
- Tripsy — Instagram Reel travel place extraction app
- Xnote — Secure locked notes with in-app Google Drive backup, OCR image-to-text, speech-to-text AI
- React Masonry Library — Handles 10K items at 60fps (open source)

## Education

- BITS Pilani — B.E. Electrical & Electronics (2019-2023)
  - Minor in Finance
  - BITSAT score: 320
  - Associate at Center for Entrepreneurial Leadership
  - Core member, Department of Backstage & Infrastructure Management
  - Volleyball club
- Bal Bharati Public School — 95.6% in CBSE Class XII (School topper), CGPA 10.0 in Class X

## Skills

TypeScript, React, React Native, Python, Java, Kotlin, Django, Firebase, Android Development, C++, Node.js, Spring Boot, Selenium, Adobe Illustrator, UI/UX Design

- "Claude Went Down for 2 Days and Devs Forgot How to Code"
- "I Built a React Masonry Library That Handles 10K Items at 60fps"

LinkedIn content focused on personal finance: credit scores, budgeting, SMART goals, financial planning.
